description_long: This barn features a prominent gable roof covered in a vivid green, grass-like texture, giving it a unique and natural appearance. The front facade displays a series of vertical supports and a central entryway, with the siding resembling rough-hewn wood planks. The roof extends down to the ground on both sides, creating a sheltered, almost camouflaged look. The structure appears to be a single, open-span building with no visible windows and a single main door. The overall form is compact and symmetrical, with the roof dominating the visual profile. The barn's exterior combines rustic wood textures with an unusual, almost organic green cladding.
description: A compact barn with a steep gable roof, rustic wood siding, and a striking green, grass-like exterior finish. The front features vertical supports and a single main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, vertical supports, and main entryway with wood-textured siding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep slope of the green roof and the solid, windowless wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the gable roof and the back wall with no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, emphasizing the continuous green roof and solid wall.
